title: Agencies
metaTitle: Invoicing & Client Billing Software for Agencies · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Free invoicing plus retainers, project quotes, expenses and a client CRM for marketing, design and digital agencies. Bill clients worldwide and get paid online.
keywords: agency invoicing, agency billing software, retainer invoicing, client crm, project quotes, marketing agency erp, agency expense tracking
heroTitle: Bill every client cleanly, on time
heroSubtitle: Send project quotes, run monthly retainers on autopilot and keep every client and payment in one place. Paper & Pen gives your agency a tidy back office without the enterprise price tag.

features.title: Project quotes
features.desc: Send itemised proposals and convert the approved one into an invoice instantly.

features.title: Retainer billing
features.desc: Put monthly retainers on recurring invoices so revenue never slips.

features.title: Client CRM
features.desc: Keep every client, contact and document in one organised place.

features.title: Online payments
features.desc: Add a payment link so clients settle invoices by card in seconds.

features.title: Expense tracking

features.title: Auto reminders

sections.title: Quotes, retainers and invoices in one flow
sections.body: Send a sharp, itemised proposal, win the work, and turn the approved quote into an invoice without re-keying. Put retainers on recurring invoices so monthly clients bill themselves, and attach payment links so they pay online the day they open the email. Your account managers stay on client work while billing runs in the background.
items: Itemised proposals that convert to invoices
Online payment links and auto reminders

sections.title: Every client, cost and payment in order
sections.body: Keep clients, contacts, quotes, invoices and rebillable expenses in one workspace, with a CRM that shows the full history at a glance. Bill clients anywhere in any currency, apply any tax rate, and add Accounting when you want full books. Built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR and 5% VAT, and just as comfortable serving clients in USD, EUR or GBP.
items: Any currency and tax rate, Accounting ready

faqs.a: Yes. Set up recurring invoices for monthly retainers so they bill themselves on schedule, with automatic reminders for anything overdue.

faqs.q: Can I turn a proposal into an invoice?
faqs.a: Yes. Send an itemised quote, and once the client approves, convert it into an invoice in a click with no re-typing.

faqs.q: Does it keep a client history?
faqs.a: Yes. The built-in CRM keeps every client, contact, quote, invoice and document together, so you see the full relationship at a glance.

faqs.q: Can I rebill expenses to clients?
faqs.a: Yes. Log supplier bills and rebillable costs, then add them to the client invoice so nothing slips through.

faqs.q: Is it free for a small agency?
faqs.a: Sales and Invoicing, including quotes, invoices and the CRM, is free forever. Add Accounting, Inventory or HR/Payroll only if your agency needs them.

ctaTitle: Give your agency a tidy back office
ctaSub: Start free with quotes, retainers and a client CRM, then add Accounting when you are ready for full books.
